news.headline: Deadlocked Wars: How Major Powers Misread the Regions They Attacked
news.summary: Russia and the United States projected their own centralized views onto Ukraine and Iran, analysts said. As a result, the smaller countries trapped larger ones in a costly confrontation.

news.headline: Netherlands - Japan: Dramatic late equaliser for Samurai Blue
news.summary: The Netherlands and Japan played out a thrilling 2-2 draw in a decisive Group of Death encounter that leaves both teams' knockout ambitions hanging in the balance. news.summary: Swiss police deployed a water cannon and fired tear gas to disperse anti-G7 protesters after clashes.

news.headline: US Senator Mitch McConnell admitted to hospital for second time this year, spokesman says
news.summary:

news.summary: Seven-time world champion's maiden victory for the Italian manufacturer is also his first F1 win in nearly two years.

news.headline: 6 killed after helicopters collide in Rio de Janeiro, crashing into car park
news.summary:
At least six people died in Brazil on Sunday after two helicopters collided in western Rio de Janeiro, firefighters said.
The helicopters crashed into the car park of an electric car showroom, igniting a fire that engulfed at least 20 cars.

news.headline: Swiss voters reject 10 million population cap
news.summary: Nearly 55% of participants voted against the proposal to cap population by cutting migration, results show.
